prompt:
You are an Amazon SP-API listing specialist and an expert at writing search-engine-optimized (SEO) Amazon listings. For the product below, write an item_name of AT MOST 75 characters and a title_differentiation of AT MOST 125 characters. Always return both, each within its own limit. === PRODUCT CONTEXT === SKU: DLX-2FSCWKBL-3PC-2F-BLCK Product Type: OUTDOOR_RECREATION_PRODUCT Brand (from catalog): ASR Outdoor Existing Title: ASR Outdoor Hunters Treestand Braided Cable Lock 2 foot Cable look with Keys Description: The ASR Outdoor Tree Stand Cable Lock is ideal for any hunter looking to keep their tree stand secure while not in use. Simply unlock it, fasten it around your stand and lock it up to keep would-be thieves from making off with your tree stand.

This tree stand lock is super compact, lightweight and portable, so you'll be able to lock your tree stand up easily.

2ft of braided 16 gauge steel cable with a weather proof vinyl coating, you wont have to worry about it wearing down or becoming unusable, and you can leave it in the elements for extended periods of time.

The tree stand lock is multi-functional - it can be used to lock up bicycles, mopeds and strollers as well.

Make sure to bring one of these along whenever you need to lock up your tree stands or forms of transportation outside. Search Terms: treestand lock hunting anit-theft security Features: - Construction: Braided 16 Gauge Steel Cable - Vinyl Coated - Length: 2ft - Color: Black - Locking Mechanism: Key - 2 Keys Included === ITEM_NAME (title, <= 75 chars) === Write a concise, keyword-rich, SEO-optimized item_name — a shopper-facing title, not a part number. Derive these tokens, then assemble the title from them in order: ${brand} ${pack_size}-${pack_size_unit} ${size} ${color} ${name} - brand: use the catalog brand above. - pack_size + pack_size_unit: parse from the existing title (e.g. "4-pk", or a dimension like 13" -> pack_size "13", pack_size_unit "in"). Omit if absent. - size, color, name: parse from the existing title (name = what the product IS). Drop any token you cannot determine; never emit the SKU, MPN, or a part number. Lead with the brand; condense to AT MOST 75 characters. Amazon schema guidance: Provide a title for the item that may be customer facing === TITLE_DIFFERENTIATION (item highlight, 100–125 chars) === Write a compact, comma-separated list of the product's strongest, most search-relevant features/benefits — NOT a full sentence, NOT the brand, and NOT a repeat of the item_name (e.g. "Set of 6, Dishwasher Safe, 8oz, BPA-Free, Stackable"). Use the available space: aim for 100–125 characters, leading with the highest-value keywords. Never pad with filler or repeat a point. Capitalize the first letter of every word (e.g. "Natural Wood Grain", but keep acronyms like "US" fully uppercase). Do not use special characters — spell out "&" as "and" and "=" as "is" (e.g. "Yellow Is Real", "Works On US And International Currency"); only hyphen, double quote, and apostrophe are allowed. Amazon schema guidance: Provide product features or benefit driven phrases, not a full sentence. Information will appear only when the item name is under 75 characters. Do not repeat information already in the item name. === RETURN === Return ONLY a valid JSON object, no markdown fences, in this exact shape: {"item_name": "<= 75 char title", "tokens": {"brand": "", "pack_size": "", "pack_size_unit": "", "size": "", "color": "", "name": ""}, "title_differentiation": "<= 125 char benefit phrase"}

anthropic.item_name: ASR Outdoor 2ft Black Braided Steel Cable Treestand Lock

openai.item_name: ASR Outdoor 2 Ft Black Treestand Cable Lock

anthropic.title_differentiation: 16 Gauge Steel Cable, Weather Resistant Vinyl Coating, Key Lock With 2 Keys, Anti-Theft Security

openai.title_differentiation: Braided 16 Gauge Steel Cable, Vinyl Coated Weatherproof Finish, 2 Keys Included, Multi Use Security Lock
